stemHtml:
Given an aeroplane with:

Maximum Structural Landing Mass: 125 000 kg
Maximum Zero Fuel Mass: 108 500 kg
Maximum Structural Take-off Mass: 155 000 kg
Dry Operating Mass: 82 000 kg
Scheduled trip fuel: 17 000 kg
Reserve fuel: 5000 kg

Assuming performance limitations are not restricting, the maximum permitted take-off mass and maximum traffic load are respectively…
